scripts.prebuild: node -e "const p=require('../package.json'); require('fs').writeFileSync('functions/generated.ts', 'export const PACKAGE_NAME = ' + JSON.stringify(p.name) + ';\nexport const PACKAGE_VERSION = ' + JSON.stringify(p.version) + ';\n')"
scripts.dev: pnpm run prebuild && wrangler pages dev public --kv MCP_CONFIG
